# LLMs.txt — AI-friendly site description
# https://unrivaled-cobbler-decd73.netlify.app

## Site: KuddusAI — Workflow Automation
URL: https://unrivaled-cobbler-decd73.netlify.app
Description: Automate repetitive business tasks with AI. Connect your tools, eliminate manual data entry, save 15+ hours per week. $300-$1,500.

## Services
- Workflow Automation ($300-$1,500)
- Data sync between CRM, email, spreadsheets
- Auto-report generation
- Process triggers and notifications
- Multi-platform integration

## Pricing
- Basic: $300 (1 workflow, 2-3 tools connected)
- Pro: $700 (3 workflows, 5+ tools, error handling)
- Enterprise: $1,500 (unlimited workflows, custom integrations)

## Contact
Email: desktopdocker11@gmail.com
Response time: Within 24 hours

## Keywords
workflow automation, business automation, process automation, data sync, CRM automation, email automation, report generation, productivity tools
